description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, clean-lined design. The exterior features light-colored siding, a dark gray cross-gabled roof, and large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The property is surrounded by a white fence and lush landscaping, including hedges and numerous trees, providing privacy and greenery. A driveway leads to a garage on one side, while the backyard includes a swimming pool and patio area, ideal for outdoor living. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and grouped patterns, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is compact yet spacious, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional living.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark cross-gabled roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, including a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, hedges, and the white fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and backyard pool area with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, pool, and a row of trees along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and additional hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
